docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-23-2012 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ECONOMOU, CAROLE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WOODSTROM, CATHEREINE $746.72 PRINCIPAL, $77.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $824.22 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY ECONOMOU, CAROLE AS TO DEFENDANT WOODSTROM, CATHEREINE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-23-2012 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
